enableResponseOutput.description: Whether to provide an additional output branch with the response sent to the webhook

generalNotice.displayName: Verify that the "Webhook" node's "Respond" parameter is set to "Using Respond to Webhook Node". <a href="https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/core-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.respondtowebhook/" target="_blank">More details

respondWith.description: The data that should be returned

allIncomingItems.description: Respond with all input JSON items

binary.description: Respond with incoming file binary data

firstIncomingItem.description: Respond with the first input JSON item

json.description: Respond with a custom JSON body

redirect.description: Respond with a redirect to a given URL

text.description: Respond with a simple text message body

webhookNotice.displayName: When using expressions, note that this node will only run for the first item in the input data

payload.description: The payload to include in the JWT token

automatically.description: Use if input data will contain a single piece of binary data

set.description: Enter the name of the input field the binary data will be in

inputFieldName.description: The name of the node input field with the binary data

contentTypeNotice.displayName: To avoid unexpected behavior, add a "Content-Type" response header with the appropriate value

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code to return. Defaults to 200.

responseHeaders.description: Add headers to the webhook response

responseKey.description: The name of the response field to put all items in

enableStreaming.description: Whether to enable streaming to the response
